panel: Try Cuemark without an account — 5 free trial credits in the panel
Guest mode opens straight to Generate; sign up free for 5 more credits
Signup prompt when trial credits run out
website: Download page and pricing copy updated for no-account trial
Windows and macOS installers updated to v1.0.1

panel: First public release — Cuemark by Keyweaver for Adobe After Effects 2022+
AI subtitles as native, editable text layers with speech-synced word timing
Generate tab: transcribe from timeline footage or upload; export SRT, VTT, and CSV
10 caption presets and 13 animations with Style, Text, and Presets controls
Impact Words — per-word highlight and single bounce
Box Cascade — pill background with centred text as words drop in from above
Style tab: fonts, colours, backgrounds, text case, and line breaks
Separate subtitle tracks for each edit comp in your project
Transcribe up to 15 minutes of footage per generate
Account menu, magic-link sign-in, and Stripe billing in the panel
Free plan with 5 starter credits (~5 minutes of transcription)
